title: ProblemSolver.REGRESSION_FIRST — Unified Cognitive Signal Packet
description: Canonical OUTPUT shape emitted by an LLM operating under skills_export/regression_first/system_prompt.md. The packet merges EL/INS analysis with a regression-first protocol trigger. The ClarityOS problem_solver kernel ingests this packet, extracts regression_chain, and wraps each layer in its own stateful envelope (chain_id + state machine + per-layer status/notes). Operators MUST emit ONLY this JSON block — no prose around it.

ratio.description: EL ÷ INS as a float string with 2 decimals. When INS = 0, emit '0.00' and treat ratio as effectively infinite for classification.

el_signals.description: Phrases or tokens from the input that registered as EL.

ins_signals.description: Phrases or tokens from the input that registered as INS.

operator_intent.description: Short inference of what the operator wants. Precise, no narrative softening.

regression_required.description: True iff the operator reported a problem and Regression-First Protocol must be initiated.

regression_chain.description: Empty when regression_required is false. Populated with a layered diagnostic walk otherwise.

recommended_system_action.description: What ClarityOS should do next given this packet.
